message:
feat(repl,runtime): add PSYNC reply parser and RDB-to-store loader

fr-repl: Add PsyncReply enum (Continue/FullResync) and parse_psync_reply()
function that parses PSYNC response lines into structured variants,
validating the FULLRESYNC format (replid + numeric offset). Includes
tests for valid Continue/FullResync parsing and rejection of malformed
inputs (missing fields, non-numeric offset, unknown keywords).

fr-runtime: Add apply_rdb_entries_to_store() function that loads decoded
RDB entries into the Store, handling all five value types (String, List,
Set, Hash, SortedSet) with proper expiry propagation. This enables
full-resync replica initialization by decoding an RDB payload and
applying it to the in-memory store. Also imports decode_rdb and
parse_psync_reply into the runtime module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
